stories.original_headline: Just two days of oatmeal cut bad cholesterol by 10%
stories.original_summary: Eating nothing but oatmeal for just two days might sound extreme, but it delivered a striking payoff in a new clinical trial. People with metabolic syndrome who followed a short, calorie-reduced oat-based plan saw their harmful LDL cholesterol drop by 10%, along with modest weight loss and lower blo
stories.fantasy_headline: Mystical Oats Ward Off Shadowy Blood Maladies!
stories.fantasy_story: Healers and alchemists conducted a grand experiment with enchanted oats. They found that two days of consuming only this magical porridge significantly reduced the 'shadows' in the blood for many townsfolk. This ancient grain also brought a modest lightening of frame and calmer vital spirits, proving its potent healing properties.

stories.original_headline: NASA study finds ancient life could survive 50 million years in Martian ice
stories.original_summary: Mars’ frozen ice caps may be time capsules for ancient life. Lab experiments show that key building blocks of proteins can survive tens of millions of years in pure ice, even under relentless cosmic radiation. Ice mixed with Martian-like soil, however, destroys organic material far more quickly. The
stories.fantasy_headline: Crimson Planet's Ice Holds Secrets of Ancient Life!
stories.fantasy_story: The Grand Wizards of the Celestial Observatory have gazed upon the Crimson Planet. Their mystical investigations suggest that its frozen caps could hide primordial essences of life for ages. While celestial energies are harsh, pure ice offers a remarkable sanctuary, preserving these vital building blocks for millions of years.

stories.original_headline: Burger King will use AI to check if employees say ‘please’ and ‘thank you’
stories.original_summary: Burger King is launching an AI chatbot that will live in the headsets used by employees. The voice-enabled chatbot, called "Patty," is part of an overarching BK Assistant platform that will not only assist employees with meal preparation but also evaluate their interactions with customers for "frien
stories.fantasy_story: The King's Feast Hall Guild is introducing new Courtesy Sprites. These tiny, enchanted familiars will dwell within the ear-charms of kitchen apprentices. Beyond aiding in meal preparation, the sprites will listen closely, ensuring every guest receives proper courtesies and kind words from the staff.

stories.original_headline: The smart lock standard that could replace your keys is finally here
stories.original_summary: Aliro has officially arrived. The smart lock standard, first announced in 2023, finally has a 1.0 spec, meaning companies can now get hardware certified and roll out support. Aliro is an open standard designed to let any smart lock be unlocked by any smartphone, regardless of manufacturer. It stores
stories.fantasy_story: The Grand Artificers' Guild has unveiled Aliro, a universal enchantment for magical bolts. This new binding accord means any enchanted ward can now be opened with a simple touch from one's pocket scrying glass. No longer will townsfolk need a jumble of cumbersome physical keys for their strongboxes and manor doors.
